title: lamottea calva
intro: Lamottea calva, also known as Chinese wormwood, is a plant species native to China. It belongs to the family Apiaceae and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Lamottea calva can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
